name: Helia Group Limited
analysis: HLI has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 1% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$5.5400. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$5.5900, stop A$4.8015, target A$7.9555 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
